text:
The 2024 Summer Olympics begin today with opening ceremonies and there are going to be eight Yellow Jackets competing this summer, representing six countries.

Seven of the eight Yellow Jackets in Paris will be making their Olympic debuts. Berke Saka is the lone returner after serving as TГғВјrkiyeГўВҖВҷs co-flag bearer in the 2020 Tokyo Olympics and competing in the 200M backstroke.

Christopher Eubanks (tennis) and Julia Bergmann (volleyball) are the first Olympians in the history of their respective programs while Jose Alvarado (menГўВҖВҷs basketball) becomes the sixth Jacket to represent Tech menГўВҖВҷs basketball at the games.

Christopher Eubanks (GT 2014-17) ГўВҖВ“ MenГўВҖВҷs Tennis ГўВҖВ“ Team USA

When: Eubanks begins his quest for a medal on Saturday, July 27 at 6 a.m. against LebanonГўВҖВҷs Benjamin Hassan

Where: Roland Garros

Watch: Peacock

MenГўВҖВҷs Tennis Olympic Bracket

Jose Alvarado (GT 2017-21) ГўВҖВ“ MenГўВҖВҷs Basketball ГўВҖВ“ Team Puerto Rico

When: Alvarado and Team Puerto Rico will play three group stage contests in the opening week of the games for a chance at qualifying for the medal rounds.

July 28, 5 am: Puerto Rico vs. South Sudan - WATCH

July 31, 11:15 am: Puerto Rico vs. Serbia - WATCH

August 3, 11:15 am: Puerto Rico vs. United States  - WATCH

Where: Group Stage: Pierre Mauroy Stadium in Lille / Medal Rounds: Accor Arena in Paris

MenГўВҖВҷs Basketball Schedule and Results

Julia Bergmann (GT 2019-22) ГўВҖВ“ WomenГўВҖВҷs Volleyball ГўВҖВ“ Team Brazil

When: Bergmann and Team Brazil will play three group stage contests in the opening week of the games for a chance at qualifying for the medal rounds.

July 29, 7 am: Brazil vs. Kenya - WATCH

August 1, 7am: Brazil vs. Japan - WATCH

August 4, 3pm: Brazil vs. Poland - WATCH

Where: Paris Expo Porte de Versailles

WomenГўВҖВҷs Volleyball Schedule and Results

Imane El Barodi (GT 2019-23) ГўВҖВ“ WomenГўВҖВҷs Swimming (100M breaststroke) ГўВҖВ“ Team Morocco

When: July 28, 5 a.m. ET - WATCH

Where: Paris La Defense Arena

Olympic Swimming Schedule and Results

Berke Saka (senior) ГўВҖВ“ MenГўВҖВҷs Swimming (200M backstroke) - Team TГғВјrkiye

When: July 31, 5 a.m. ET - WATCH

Where: Paris La Defense Arena

Olympic Swimming Schedule and Results

Ariana Dirkzwager (junior) ГўВҖВ“ WomenГўВҖВҷs Swimming (200M freestyle) ГўВҖВ“ Team Laos

When: July 28, 5 a.m. ET - WATCH

Where: Paris La Defense Arena

Olympic Swimming Schedule and Results

Ela Naz Ozdemir (Incoming freshman) ГўВҖВ“ WomenГўВҖВҷs Swimming (4x200M Freestyle Relay) ГўВҖВ“ Team TГғВјrkiye

When: August 1, 5 a.m. ET - WATCH

Where: Paris La Defense Arena

Olympic Swimming Schedule and Results

Giovana Reis (Incoming freshman) ГўВҖВ“ WomenГўВҖВҷs Swimming (4x100M Freestyle Relay) ГўВҖВ“ Team Brazil

When: July 27, 5 a.m. ET - WATCH

Where: Paris La Defense Arena

Olympic Swimming Schedule and Results

In addition to the eight athletes competing in the games, Georgia Tech will have two more representatives in Paris, Toni M. And Richard L. Bergmark Swimming and Diving Coach Courtney Hart will be coaching Dirkzwager in her event as a member of Team Laos. Additionally, four-time Olympian, 2008 Bronze medalist and Georgia Tech Hall of Fame Inductee ChauntГғВ© Lowe will also be in attendance as a member of President BidenГўВҖВҷs U.S. delegation as a member of the PresidentГўВҖВҷs Council on Sports, Fitness & Nutrition.

title: Eight Georgia Tech Yellow Jackets Will Compete In 2024 Summer Olympics In Paris
description: The 2024 Summer Olympics begin today with opening ceremonies and there are going to be eight Yellow Jackets competing this summer, representing six countries.
